title: EDUCATION PROGRAM - 211info
text: NEW AVENUES FOR YOUTH EDUCATION PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers GED preparation and information on how to access college. Offers one-on-one support from teachers and tutors. Participates currently enrolled in case management with New Avenues for Youth may be eligible for an educational scholarship who are attending career technical education or postsecondary education!. 314 SW 9th Avenue Portland, OR 97205 Eligibility: Ages 16-24 who are at-risk or experiencing housing instability Hours: Tuesday-Thursday 10am-1pm and 2pm-4pm Email (503) 358-9142 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 358-9142 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: College/University Entrance Support * At Risk Youth GED/High School Equivalency Test Instruction * At Risk Youth Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - PROMOTING AVENUES TO EMPLOYMENT HOUSING/SHELTER - NEW DAY INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEW AVENUES FOR YOUTH
